title: What to Know About This Fund's $140 Million FTI Consulting Bet Amid Rising Demand
author: Jonathan Ponciano
description: Fiduciary Management acquired 823,713 shares of FTI Consulting for approximately $140.52 million in Q1 2026, representing a contrarian bet on a high-quality business that has underperformed the market. Despite a 10% year-over-year stock decline, FTI Consulting showed strong Q1 revenue growth of 9.5% with particularly robust performance in Corporate Finance (up 19%) and Strategic Communications (up 18%), though adjusted EBITDA margins compressed from 12.8% to 9.8% due to increased compensation and SG&A expenses.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong underlying business fundamentals with 9.5% YoY revenue growth and robust growth in key segments (Corporate Finance +19%, Strategic Communications +18%). The significant institutional investment by Fiduciary Management suggests confidence in the company's value despite recent stock underperformance. Rising demand for consulting services in a 'complicated and disrupted world' supports future growth prospects.

title: FTI Consulting Appoints Financial Services Transactions Expert Emanuele Grasso to Lead in Italy
author: Na
description: FTI Consulting announced the appointment of Emanuele Grasso as Senior Managing Director and Leader of its Corporate Finance segment in Italy. Grasso brings over 30 years of experience in advising financial services clients on M&A, due diligence, and SPAC transactions across 20+ countries. The appointment reflects FTI's strategic investment in expanding its capabilities in Italy and strengthening its financial services offerings across the EMEA region.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The appointment of an experienced senior executive with 30+ years of expertise signals strategic growth and investment in expanding the firm's capabilities in Italy and EMEA. The company is actively strengthening its corporate finance and financial services offerings, demonstrating confidence in market expansion and talent acquisition.

title: FTI Consulting Expands Data Analytics & AI Healthcare Expertise With Three Senior Hires
author: Fti Consulting, Inc.
description: FTI Consulting announced the expansion of its Health and Human Services practice in Australia with the appointment of three senior professionals: Kerrie Young as Senior Managing Director leading the Data Analytics & AI team, and James Baulch and Cameron Cuthbert as Managing Directors. The expansion aims to help Australian healthcare organizations address rising demand, workforce constraints, and funding pressures through digital health, data-led care, and applied AI solutions.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is strategically expanding its Health and Human Services practice in Australia by hiring three experienced senior professionals with complementary expertise in data analytics, AI, and digital transformation. This expansion demonstrates business growth, market confidence, and capability enhancement to serve growing healthcare sector demands.

title: FTI Consulting Appoints Benedict Brogan to Strategic Communications Segment
author: Na
description: FTI Consulting announced the appointment of Benedict Brogan as Senior Managing Director in its Strategic Communications segment, based in London. Brogan brings over 30 years of experience as a political journalist and advisor, previously serving as Managing Director at Global Counsel and Group Public Affairs Director at Lloyds Banking Group. He will strengthen FTI's financial services practice across the EMEA region.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The appointment of an experienced senior executive with strong credentials in financial services and political advisory strengthens the firm's capabilities and market positioning. The company is actively investing in senior talent and expanding its financial services practice, indicating growth and confidence in business expansion.

title: FTI Consulting Appoints Aurélien Vincent to Lead Financial Services Practice in the Middle East
author: Na
description: FTI Consulting announced the appointment of Aurélien Vincent as Senior Managing Director in its Strategy & Transformation practice, based in Dubai. Vincent will lead the firm's financial services capabilities in the Middle East, supporting clients in banking, capital markets, asset management, and fintech sectors. He brings over 20 years of experience from McKinsey, JPMorgan, and BNP Paribas.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The appointment of an experienced senior managing director with 20+ years in financial services and a strong track record at top-tier firms (McKinsey, JPMorgan, BNP Paribas) demonstrates FTI Consulting's strategic investment in growing its Middle East operations and capabilities. This signals confidence in regional market opportunities and strengthens the firm's competitive positioning in financial services consulting.
